1.notes: getAllComponents maps all components by ID. We create 2 components to verify the map works.

6.notes: Broadcaster setup with mouse events. Compile + verify objects created. Can't trigger mouse events via REPL.

7.notes: Defines an inline function copyMidiFile(). Compile-only test - function requires a real File object to call.

8.skipReason: Engine.loadFontAs requires actual font files on disk which are not available in test environment
8.notes: Scans filesystem for font files and loads them. Requires actual TTF/OTF files.

12.notes: Mouse callback panel. Compile + verify components exist. Can't trigger mouse events via REPL.

13.notes: Example already has makeFrontInterface. MAIN=0.5 -> normalisedToRange(0.5, 0, 7)=3.5, (0.5, 0, 1)=0.5, (0.5, 100, 170)=135.
